description: Default prompt for Tencent Cloud MPS VideoComprehension analysis. Instructs MPS to analyze video content and return structured scenes (分镜) and tags (标签) in JSON format.
user_prompt:
Please analyze this video and provide comprehensive scenes and tags. Focus on:
- Key topics and discussion points
- Visual elements and on-screen content
- Speaker changes and conversation flow
- Overall video category and style

{tag_library}
